adminPlans.noCoursesYet: No courses yet — please add a course first
adminPlans.allCoursesPlanned: All courses already have a plan
adminPlans.assignmentHelp: All users in the selected job titles plus the additional users are assigned together. Users later assigned to a job title are also automatically enrolled.
adminPlans.updateNoteBody: When you add a new job title, assignments are generated only for users who don't yet have one. Existing users' status, attempts and progress are preserved — they continue where they left off. Removing a job title does not delete existing assignments.

errors.duplicatePlan: A plan already exists for this course: "{title}". Edit the existing plan or delete it first.
